View.Name: {99486C4E-9B27-4EE9-A103-F045766ECD0A}
View.CustomFormatter: {"tileProps":{"height":346,"width":254,"hideSelection":false,"fillHorizontally":true,"formatter":{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-container"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-defaultClickButton"},"customRowAction":{"action":"defaultClick"}},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-white sp-css-borderColor-neutralLight sp-card-borderHighlight sp-card-subContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label"},"txtContent":"[!Title.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"[$Title]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content sp-card-highlightedContent","role":"heading","aria-level":"3"},"txtContent":"=if ([$Title] == '', '–', [$Title])"}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-previewColumnContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label"},"txtContent":"[!TeamMembersAccounts.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"div","style":{"display":"flex"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-userEmptyText"},"txtContent":"=if(length([$TeamMembersAccounts]) == 0, '–', '')"},{"forEach":"personIterator in [$TeamMembersAccounts]","elmType":"a","attributes":{"class":"=if(loopIndex('personIterator') >= 5, 'sp-card-userContainer', 'sp-card-userContainer sp-card-keyboard-focusable')"},"style":{"display":"=if(loopIndex('personIterator') >= 5, 'none', '')"},"defaultHoverField":"[$personIterator]","children":[{"elmType":"img","attributes":{"src":"=getUserImage([$personIterator.email], 'S')","alt":"[$personIterator.title]","title":"[$personIterator.title]","class":"sp-card-userThumbnail"},"style":{"display":"=if(length([$TeamMembersAccounts]) > 5 && loopIndex('personIterator') >= 4, 'none', '')"}},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"ms-bgColor-neutralLight ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-userOthers"},"style":{"display":"=if(length([$TeamMembersAccounts]) > 5 && loopIndex('personIterator') == 4, '', 'none')"},"customCardProps":{"formatter":{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-personCallout"},"children":[{"forEach":"personIterator in [$TeamMembersAccounts]","elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-userContainer sp-card-userCustomCard"},"style":{"display":"=if(loopIndex('personIterator') < 4, 'none', '')"},"children":[{"elmType":"img","defaultHoverField":"[$personIterator]","attributes":{"src":"=getUserImage([$personIterator.email], 'S')","title":"[$personIterator.title]","class":"sp-card-userThumbnail"}}]}]},"openOnEvent":"hover"},"children":[{"elmType":"span","txtContent":"='+' + toString(length([$TeamMembersAccounts]) - (4))"}]}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-userTitle sp-card-keyboard-focusable"},"style":{"display":"=if(length([$TeamMembersAccounts]) == 1, '', 'none')"},"defaultHoverField":"[$personIterator]","txtContent":"[$TeamMembersAccounts.title]"}]}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label"},"txtContent":"[!Team_x0020_Leader.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"[$Team_x0020_Leader]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$Team_x0020_Leader] == '', '–', [$Team_x0020_Leader])"}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label"},"txtContent":"[!FacultyLeads.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"title":"[$FacultyLeads]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content "},"txtContent":"=if ([$FacultyLeads] == '', '–', [$FacultyLeads])"}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-displayColumnContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label"},"txtContent":"[!Team_x0020_Calendar.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"a","attributes":{"title":"[$Team_x0020_Calendar]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content sp-card-urlContent sp-card-keyboard-focusable","href":"[$Team_x0020_Calendar]","target":"=if ([$Team_x0020_Calendar] == '', '', '_blank')"},"style":{"pointer-events":"=if ([$Team_x0020_Calendar] == '', 'none', 'auto')","text-decoration":"=if ([$Team_x0020_Calendar] == '', 'none', 'auto')"},"txtContent":"=if ([$Team_x0020_Calendar.desc] == '', '–', [$Team_x0020_Calendar.desc])"}]},{"elmType":"div","attributes":{"class":"sp-card-lastTextColumnContainer"},"children":[{"elmType":"p","attributes":{"class":"ms-fontColor-neutralSecondary sp-card-label"},"txtContent":"[!Team_x0020_Drive.DisplayName]"},{"elmType":"a","attributes":{"title":"[$Team_x0020_Drive]","class":"ms-fontColor-neutralPrimary sp-card-content sp-card-urlContent sp-card-keyboard-focusable","href":"[$Team_x0020_Drive]","target":"=if ([$Team_x0020_Drive] == '', '', '_blank')"},"style":{"pointer-events":"=if ([$Team_x0020_Drive] == '', 'none', 'auto')","text-decoration":"=if ([$Team_x0020_Drive] == '', 'none', 'auto')"},"txtContent":"=if ([$Team_x0020_Drive.desc] == '', '–', [$Team_x0020_Drive.desc])"}]}]}],"templateId":"TileDesigner100"},"designerConfig":[1,0,"LinkTitle",1,"TeamMembersAccounts",0,"Team_x0020_Leader",0,"FacultyLeads",0,"Team_x0020_Calendar",0,"Team_x0020_Drive"]}}
